summary: Lead accepts M4 client campaign planning UI after writer REVIEW, independent QA ACCEPT, code/diff review, path checks, and required local gates.

tests_run.result: 10 paths before QA handoff; all inside allowed_paths. QA also reported 14 changed/untracked paths inside allowed_paths.
Vite web production build passed with existing large chunk warning.
5 Playwright Chromium tests passed, including M4 campaign planning command flow.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism canaries matched; 33 root Vitest files / 237 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file / 3 tests passed.
Prettier, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed.

decisions: Accept fixture-backed web shell DTO callback as consistent with existing M3 client shell; live Worker submit wiring remains future integration work, not this task.
Accept thin client-core M4 query row projection interfaces because protocol exports command/AI trace types but not all query result DTO row interfaces; QA recorded drift risk.
Do not edit PROJECT_STATUS.md because this task explicitly forbids it.
risks: Web shell still uses bootstrapped fixture/read-model snapshots and a DTO status callback instead of live Worker CommandResult path.
Client-core mirrors narrow M4 query result row shapes until protocol exports those result DTOs.
requested_action: Commit accepted implementation, open PR, wait for CI, merge, sync main, then mark task CLOSED only after main integration.
